licensePolicy: Only license-verified templates are included. Treat them as pattern references for MicroAgency section output.

templates.name: Agency
templates.description: Agency is a Bootstrap 5 template for agency, portfolio, landing page, timeline. Useful patterns: portfolio presentation, timeline storytelling. Readme title: Agency](https://startbootstrap.com/theme/agency).
templates.llmGuidance: use for strong visual case-study or gallery sections; adapt timeline into process or company story; use product grid/detail patterns for catalogues and service menus. Rebuild with MicroAgency sections, validated theme tokens, accessible Bootstrap markup, and original client-specific copy.
